UG-25  CORROSION. (a) Vessels subject to corrosion, erosion, or mechanical abrasion shall have provision made by a suitable increase in the thickness of the material over that determined by the design formulas of UG-27 and UG-28. (b) The rate of corrosion expected during the design life shall be established by the user. The corrosion allowance shall be added to the minimum required thickness as determined in accordance with UG-27. (c) Internal and external surfaces shall be accessible for inspection as required by UG-46 and UG-93, except as permitted by UG-47 when access is physically impractical. See also UG-22 for consideration of corrosion effects on design loads.
